title: UAP marks World Veterinary Day with focus on food security
description: Peshawar - Experts at the University of Agriculture Peshawar (UAP) on Tuesday stressed the need for strengthening veterinary services, modern livestock management and research to ensure food security and public health during a ceremony held in connection with World Veterinary Day 2026.

title: NASA's secret emails raise questions about 'GoFast' UFO verdict
description: A trove of NASA emails regarding its analysis of a famous 2015 UFO sighting has raised questions about how the American space agency conducted its review.

title: Pentagon Report Debunks UFO Claims as Navy's Tim Gallaudet Calls Ex-Chief Sean Kirkpatrick a 'Liar'
description: A Pentagon report dismissing UFO claims has sparked a public row, with retired Navy figure Tim Gallaudet accusing officials of disinformation, intensifying the debate over extraterrestrial evidence.

title: UFO Entities Warned US Officials Their War On God Has Begun In Chilling Secret Contact Claims
description: A new documentary claims UAPs are interdimensional entities linked to religious texts, but lacks scientific evidence. It references an FBI memo and historical events without verified support.

title: Trump orders Pentagon to open UFO "black vault" as Australia stays silent - 4BC
description: President Trump has officially directed the Pentagon to declassify every file on UAPs, potentially exposing an 80-year cover-up of crash retrievals and secret treaties. Australian researcher Grant Lavac joined Gary to discuss why the U.S. is finally coming clean while Australia continues to “sit on its hands” regarding its own mysterious sightings. Hear more highlights [...]
